titleZh: 大型首次公开募股和大型后续发行不断涌现；
titleEn: Mega IPOs and Mega Follow-On Offerings Keep Coming; Under Massive Financing, One of the "Core Highlights" of U.S. Stocks Is Gone
descriptionZh: SpaceX 以 750 亿美元完成了历史上最大规模的 IPO，OpenAI 和 Anthropic 正在为大型 IPO 做准备，Alphabet 正计划进行 850 亿美元的后续发行。
descriptionEn: SpaceX completed the largest IPO in history at $75 billion, OpenAI and Anthropic are gearing up for mega IPOs, and Alphabet is planning an $85 billion follow-on offering. JPMorgan estimates net equity supply will reach $1.5 trillion over the next two years; Goldman Sachs predicts net supply will return to zero from negative in 2026. The era of "de-equitization" that supported two decades of U.S. stock bull market has come to an end, and supply shocks may become a major market headwind.

title: QuestMobile 2026 AI电商与消费品GEO研究报告：变现困难，电商成核心路径，平台源引用集中，“生态闭合”与“消费者决策”成商业渠道
description: 所有平台都表现出相似的模式，均以生态系统内的顶级来源为主——豆宝来自抖音+抖音电商的内容高达 81.1%，而文心来自百度的引用高达 81.7%……
titleZh: QuestMobile 2026 AI电商与消费品GEO研究报告：变现困难，电商成核心路径，平台源引用集中，“生态闭合”与“消费者决策”成商业渠道
titleEn: QuestMobile 2026 AI E-commerce and Consumer Goods GEO Research Report: Monetization Difficulties, E-commerce Becomes Core Path, Platform Source Citations Concentrated, with "Ecosystem Closure" and "Consumer Decision-Making" as Commercial Channels
descriptionZh: 所有平台都表现出相似的模式，均以生态系统内的顶级来源为主——豆宝来自抖音+抖音电商的内容高达 81.1%，而文心来自百度的引用高达 81.7%……
descriptionEn: All platforms show similar patterns, dominated by top sources within their ecosystems—Doubao’s content from Douyin + Douyin E-commerce reaches up to 81.1%, while Wenxin’s citations from Baidu reach up to 81.7%...

description: 从写指令，到设定目标，再到只是给出一个意图：有人让 Codex 定义了自己的任务——人类还能停留在编程的规划层吗？

titleEn: Coders not even writing tasks anymore? Codex starts assigning tasks to itself

descriptionEn: From writing instructions, to setting goals, to just giving an intention: someone has let Codex define its own tasks—can humans still stay in the planning layer of programming?

title: 受《神鬼寓言5》禁令影响，GPT-5.6或将延迟
titleZh: 受《神鬼寓言5》禁令影响，GPT-5.6或将延迟
titleEn: Affected by the Fable 5 ban, GPT-5.6 may be delayed
descriptionEn: Fable 5 has been banned; the U.S. government accuses Anthropic of being perfunctory, while Anthropic insists it is an isolated incident. Dario compares the technology to a nuclear bomb, yet now finds himself in a deadlock due to unwillingness to shut down the system, dragging the entire U.S. AI industry down with him.

title: OpenAI尚未敲响钟声，却已创造了300位亿万富翁
description: 在敲响钟声之前，他们已经分发了1000亿！
titleZh: OpenAI尚未敲响钟声，却已创造了300位亿万富翁
titleEn: OpenAI hasn't rung the bell yet, but has already created 300 billionaires
descriptionZh: 在敲响钟声之前，他们已经分发了1000亿！
descriptionEn: Before ringing the bell, they've already distributed 100 billion! OpenAI's latest share sale creates over 300 million-dollar millionaires, with 75 people each pocketing 200 million. Keeping a top researcher costs more than training a model.
